Summary DAMASANI NAGA SATHVIK
+91 7675975489 | dnagasathvik@gmail.com | LinkedIn | GitHub
Computer Science undergraduate with strong foundations in algorithms, data structures, machine learning, and software engineering,
complemented by hands-on experience in Python and Java. Developed end-to-end machine learning applications involving data prepossessing,
feature engineering, model development, and analytics. Actively exploring Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval- Augmented Generation

(RAG), AI agents, and intelligent automation systems. Interested in applied AI research, scalable machine learning systems, and building
impactful solutions to real-world challenges through data-driven innovation.

Applications in Astrophysics
Projects
Customer Churn Prediction System
Machine Learning | Predictive Analytics | Python | Scikit-learn

Designed and developed an end-to-end machine learning pipeline to predict customer churn using demographic, subscription, and
behavioral datasets.
Conducted extensive data prepossessing and feature engineering, including missing-value handling, categorical encoding, nor- malization,
and feature selection.
Trained and evaluated multiple supervised learning models to analyze customer churn probability and identify high-risk customer segments.

Developed an interactive dashboard for churn analytics, risk monitoring, and business intelligence through visual data exploration.
Implemented data upload, prediction, and reporting workflows to support customer retention strategies.
Tech Stack: Python, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, SQL, React.js, Tailwind CSS
